name: Italian Pesto Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup half & half or light cream
2/3 cup fresh parsley leaves, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Prepare the crust according to the recipe for Classic Quiche.
3. Prepare the filling: In a medium bowl, beat eggs and half & half until well blended.
4. In a food processor or blender, finely chop parsley, garlic, basil, and oregano.
5. Add oil in thin steady stream while the motor runs; process for 10-15 seconds.
6. Add walnuts and process only until finely chopped.
7. Stir the mixture into the egg mixture.
8. Sprinkle cheese over the bottom of the prebaked crust.
9. Place the tart pan on the oven rack and pour the pesto mixture over the cheese.
10. Bake as directed for Classic Quiche. Makes 8 servings.
